reasoning: The control SI-19(4) focuses on de-identification through removal, masking, encryption, hashing, or replacement. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that sensitive data stored as Secrets is encrypted at rest using etcd encryption. Additionally, masking and hashing can be implemented by ensuring that sensitive data is appropriately transformed before being stored in Secrets. These practices align with the control's requirement for data protection and de-identification.
title: De-Identification - De - identification | removal , masking , encryption , hashing , or replacement
